highlights: Architected RDUP multi-tenant real estate SaaS platform for Mabanee Group using Laravel 12 and Laravel Reverb.
Built isolated dynamic database structures for large-scale mall and construction projects.
Designed Paws HUB multi-tenant pet clinic management system with dynamic role-permissions and billing.

Engineered University Hall Management System, enabling owners to monetize space resources (coaching rooms, projectors, play grounds) with ad-hoc reservations, scheduling calendars, and infrastructure catalogues using Laravel 12, MySQL, and AWS.

Architected multi-tenant Hall Management System for restaurant/hotel owners with isolated tenant databases, subdomain URLs, dynamic day-wise package configurations (DJ, decorations, assets), and comprehensive financial reports using Laravel 12, MySQL, Cron Schedulers, and AWS.
Debugged critical 3rd party API synchronizations and scalability crashes on Oak Haven platform.
Created contractor online-offline synchronization modules using Expo Push APIs for Unlimited Power.
Created Avenues permit & mall management system with multi-tenant database models.
Engineered TreeroseHUB automated supply chain orders dashboard with real-time Socket.IO alerts.
Developed Node.js streaming chat microservices and Wag Buddy pet social media reels processing pipelines.
Constructed timelined classroom booking APIs and automated YouTube content catalog indexing.
